title: remove remaining phase method

body:
Adds a way to output a vertical profile of minimum value of a tracer, mean negative value of a tracer and a fraction of the domain that has negative tracer. 

Requires ClimaDiagnostics v0.3.1
title: Add 1D negative tracers statistics to output
